# Sprint 3.1 Derived Metrics

**Sprint:** Sprint 3. Analytics Layer
**Objective:** Design and implement the analytics layer for nurse staffing and burnout analytics.

## Description
Develop derived metrics for nurse staffing and burnout analytics, including overtime rate, consecutive shift count, absence frequency, and burnout risk index.

## Deliverable
Derived metrics design
